claim: Stock consolidation range should be under 12% measured from open/close of recent candles for valid breakout setups
actionable: When screening for consolidation breakouts, set consolidation range threshold to under 12% to identify tight coiling patterns
source_title: Claude Code Built a FREE Breakout Stock Screener

claim: Breakout candle body should be at least 5% on 4-hour charts, not 4%, to confirm real institutional conviction vs hourly drift
actionable: Correct breakout candle minimum to 5% body for 4-hour timeframe; 4% allows weak setups with only final-minute conviction
source_title: Claude Code Built a FREE Breakout Stock Screener

claim: Relative volume cap of 2x should be removed entirely; volume of 3-5x is more explosive and worth including
actionable: Set relative volume floor to 1.5x minimum with no ceiling; higher volume is more bullish for breakouts
source_title: Claude Code Built a FREE Breakout Stock Screener

claim: Average daily volume should be above 500k-1M shares to ensure liquid exits; thin stocks fabricate breakouts on single orders
actionable: Set minimum average daily volume filter to 500k shares for US stocks and 3 crore for Indian stocks to ensure liquidity
source_title: Claude Code Built a FREE Breakout Stock Screener

claim: Claude Code can build full-stack React + Tailwind + Express + Node.js stock screener with live charting in a single prompt
actionable: Use Claude Code to build data-intensive full-stack web applications; specify chart libraries and data sources in single prompt
source_title: Claude Code Built a FREE Breakout Stock Screener
